content: I can't even slap on any of the ones I currently have on her since I never focused on psycubes for more than 4 characters
Noooo Sorel has fallen to the dark side
I've been playing r1999 for a while
Just never showed any pictures until now
so u are using semmel as a main carry?
or do u use Eternity as replacement?
My team consists of a 5 star, 6 star, and 4 star

so do you
- roll Sentinel for duo carry
- have Eternity E2?
i need to know so i can change pyschube
This is pretty much the team i run
Before the Assassin's creed collab, I used A Knight instead of Ezio
I mainly used Mondlicht, Knight, and Dikke
Bkorn was for filling in the 4th slot for bossfights
Reality damage is the one I like running the most
but if u have dedication then it could work some ways
I run Mond since she's a Brother's Grimm reference. While not my main dps anymore, her silver bullet and also passive is why I still use her
ok i check on Mond's scaling
Really great cleanup unit since she has cards that deal bonus to units at either low or high health
but i think Mond's main scaling is Ult
so i think u would run her with Ult-based comp yeh?
lemme get u a team skeleton
since Mond is a reality dps -> Getian support well
Melania is basically the meta unit for Ult-based team
ok do u have any questions?
Rubushka isnt out yet so replace her with any sustain u have
No, just knowing the psycube for her was enough.
Actually, what does it mean by bullet effect
Does she have one as well?
but that psy is the best support option
yeh u basically ignore the bullet
Mond's dmg sources are Incan + Ult
so it is undoubtly the best support psychube
+ Sem has Array so she can abuse it, only applies if Mond + Sem tho
the team skeleton i gave u, it's Getian holding it
I think need only 6* and auto
they can only work as replacements until u have 6* and leave the 4* xD
I'll probably keep the team and replace bkorn with Sem
The constant aoe each turn from her ult is really good trade off for the hp
u can even make semmel your main carry
Think i can make animal team here
Hope they make drunken bear with bottle of vodka
yeh u can almost see your Arcana
The yellow thing that coat the rice throughout
i think there is a spice?
the same sauce you do for spaghettis
Look like half way to a risotto
I have left over sauce, so i just use that
but Spain has this kind of rice dish
idk if red can read it
I can’t but I can lick the picture <:drool:1356053063139463248>
yes, but chimichurri are just spices
Is there any tasty street food u would recommend?
Street food or food from small stores and shops
food from the street vendors vro
They both are good place to find good food
Bread green and meat it got everything
Do u typically eat it by itself or with a sauce?
in winter I and my dad and I do some of those directly from the pig
I think i had never seen it with sauce
rice paper rolled with quail eggs, sliced mango, some beef jerky, toppings, herbs
U can add fruit in it?! Huh?!
only mangos can be used tho
other fruits, i dont think so
u can customize your filling dw
This is like if someone decided to add mango in burgers 🍔
it is just rolled rice papers with fillings
u can use pineapple in those too
Rice paper usually use vegetable or savoury stuff
i mean on rice papers, not pizza lmao
like an ingredient u wouldnt think it is in there but it is
like coconut, u can make it savory and sweet
mango, u can make salads + sweet + even in some savory dishes
we have those fried pouch dumplings like empanadas too
just like empandas, meat filling with some veggies and mushrooms
u can totally rock with it
It’s kinda weird yet quirky how a lot of people kinda make the same food concept throughout despite never seeing or knowing about the other countries isn’t it?
A good example of this is dumplings <:agree:1400771815076528258>
soup with tomatoes and eggs and some herbs + chives
maybe ill try to make one, but Im not a fan of soup
Isn't this a very traditional Cantonese home food?
I have a lot of favourite dishes a good portion involve egg tho
We kinda stole? Borrow it and make it our own
this one is our, altho it may have some chinese influence
a lot of things here are spanish and italian
and some french and some american here and there
ñoquis, empanadas, milanesas, canelones, tuco, etc
Do u guys still have some aboriginal cuisine or art laying around? If its too much u don’t have to answer it
We here in Australia it’s practically nonexistent
Blec is a lovely Argentinian man
Food or art or anything that still leftover from Aboriginal
I thought aboriginals were specific to Australia?
we drink mate. yerba mate. its something like tea, but not the tea plant
just some cooking and redefine it
i always eat leftovers and make a new one
Sorry idk the word the original settler? The people before Spain and Italy? Idk
but i am more a coffee person
Word you are looking for is "indigenous"
i wonder if Blec likes to drink egg coffee
yes, its just another plant, so its not technically tea. also you cant boil the water
we have daisy teas, bla bla idk much about tea
and we put raw eggs in coffee
Do you have specialized kettle for it? (Like goose neck kettles for coffee)
the Australians were peaceful til the Bri'ish came here
? So how does one go from getting the mate from the plant? Just room temperature water? Kinda like tea? Or another method?
I touch the top of the kettle when its hot enough, i know the water is right
and how does it taste like
i dont think it's salty but i expect sweet and bitter and herbal ye
its better tea for me i guess? is less bitter than tea, and
that's all i need to know
<@964125234871545886> i think we should steal Blecnes's fridge fr
and enjoy all the Argentinian food
one usually dont use burning hot water
You can add honey to it?!
sometimes i put coffee in it
We have a honey in nz heavily sought after for it's medicinal properties
idk normal? i dont really like honey
Have u guys ever tried toast with butter and honey?!
there are also different uhh marks? or companies? eachone taste different
Yup! Honey can vary by taste depending on what flowers the bees 🐝 collect from
WE ARE GOING TO TOWN WITH MATE
i think you can get it in other countries but is not cheap
is the one i most like
Ho? Where is that meme of jojo approaching meme

You missed the hand photos Arisu <:wish:1356084702468899117>
U are asking a hermit this question and it can vary by region but we pretty chill imo
you have the nails of a princess tho
I go to school in the city so it’s very liberal but for more country side area yes
Depends on region and areas really

- in 1 category, u can form a team of 4 units
- after 1 battle, u can choose to delete 1 buff with the cost of choosing 1 unit to get out of battle (cannot use for later stages)
